name: Fasting Protocol Selector
criteria: 6 protocols (16:8, 18:6, 20:4, 5:2, OMAD, Custom), descriptions, localStorage persistence

name: Fasting Timer
criteria: Circular timer, start/stop/reset, elapsed/remaining display, localStorage persistence across refresh

name: Metabolic Phase Progress Bar
criteria: 5 phases with icons, descriptions, animated current phase, expandable detail cards

name: Fasting History Log
criteria: Session list, stats (week/month/avg/streak), clear history, streak badges

name: Hydration & Notes Tracker
criteria: Water glass counter, session notes, persisted in localStorage

name: Educational Tips Section
criteria: Rotating tip cards, link to /guide page

name: Export / Import Data
criteria: JSON and CSV export, JSON import

name: SEO Pages (guide, faq, about, privacy, terms)
criteria: Long-form content, per-page metadata, internal linking

name: Meta Tags + OG + Twitter Cards
criteria: Title, description, keywords, OG tags, Twitter cards on all pages

name: Adsterra Ad Placeholders
criteria: Banner top, sidebar, native mid-content, mobile footer placeholders

name: Google Sheets Webhook
criteria: Webhook module, trackFastStart, trackFastComplete, trackVisitor functions

name: Visitor Counter
criteria: localStorage-based counter in footer, webhook-ready for real counter

name: Feedback Modal
criteria: Floating button, modal with text+email fields, mailto integration

name: Dark Mode
criteria: Toggle in header, localStorage persistence, flash prevention

name: Build & Deploy to Vercel
criteria: Successful build, deploy via CLI, verify live site
